title: Bridge Essay: Relationships between people and nature: Nature connectedness and relational env

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Relationships between people and nature: Nature connectedness and relational environmental values.**. Curr Opin Psychol.. PMID: 39765177. DOI: 10.1016/j.copsyc.2024.101984. There is growing recognition that our relationship with nature needs repairing. Two operationalizations of this construct within psychology are nature connectedness and relational environmental values. This review covers recent advances on both constructs. It outlines the growing evidence that both operationalizations are strong predictors of pro-environmental outcomes. It goes on to review what is known about the antecedents of the human-nature relationship and outlines three emerging principle
